name: Chicken with Apricots, Sweet Potatoes, and Prunes
recipeIngredient: Sweet potatoes (peeled and cut into 1/2-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts in a medium bowl or casserole.
2. Combine the prunes, apricots, olive oil, vinegar, vermouth, garlic, brown sugar, oregano, and salt in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
4. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
5. When ready to bake, place sweet potato cubes in a saucepan with water covering them. Bring to a boil and gently simmer for 3 minutes. Drain and set aside.
6. Remove the chicken from the marinade and arrange pieces in a shallow baking pan.
7. Spread the marinade over the chicken, cover with sweet potatoes, and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-45 minutes until fully cooked.
Per Serving:
Calories: 323
Protein: 30 grams
Carbs: 30 grams
Sodium: 251 mg
Fat: 5 grams (14% of calories)
Adapted from "Eater's Choice" by Ron & Nancy Goor
Published in: Nutrition Action Healthletter (CSPI)
